channel.title: Lateral Movement on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Lateral Movement on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: Splunk-Pass Attacks
item.description: Research covering Pass-the-Hash, Pass-the-Ticket, and Overpass-the-Hash detection - three lateral movement techniques that authenticate without plaintext credentials by reusing stolen NTLM hashes and Kerberos tickets, with Splunk detection logic for each.
